The '''''Crystal''''' was a heavily modified [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] owned and piloted by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Crystal'' {{'s}} modifications included a reinforced hull, a powerful [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and other enhanced propulsion systems, and provisions for up to one [[Standard week/Legends|week]] of independent operation.

==History==
The ''Crystal'' was a gift from Jaina's father [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] upon her graduation from [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]].

During her first flight in the ''Crystal'', Jaina was attacked by an insane [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]], who inexplicably believed her antique fighter to be a new prototype. After a fierce dogfight, Jaina managed to shoot down the cyborg's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]].

==Behind the scenes==

Details about the ''Crystal'' are stated inconsistently in the source in which it appears. The story text says the fighter has four laser cannons, a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher and a Class 2 hyperdrive, whereas the associated statblock attributes the fighter two groups of [[Triple blaster/Legends|triple blasters]], a [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]] and a Class 1 hyperdrive. The accompanying illustration shows just one pair of wingtip cannon, and its depiction of the fighter with straight wings and four engine nacelles do not match the most natural reading of references in the text to "fixed-position double wings" and a single "port maneuvering jet".

{{Ship-stub}}
